text.message: Black Can we make a deal on the sheep port ?
2 sheep trade and its all yours
black why u wanna hurt me
Can plow on the brick port or Seattle on the 8
yeah i mean sheep port is more valuable
can I trade you ore to not plow?
red gonna run over the table
i didnt have the carda dn no one would trade
you still havent given me the 2 sheep either
I need to dorp a road
i dont get road or army
can i help you get road, black?
blue can you cut off red?
I think its good for me if it's competitive
uhhh okay so he has a bunch of vps then
give me the two sheep YOU PROMISED
im giving you an ore for free
oh so youre just not going to honor the deal
now youre just not going to. what a liar man
karma is coming your way buddy
block his sheep what are you doing
blue i think is the closest
